zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr於1366年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Robert Hill26歲，母親Mrs. Robert Hill23歲。他和Isabella Wadham至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1423年4月25日在英國薩默塞特享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.
German: variant of Hüller (see Huller ).

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Altered form of English   Hill  .
Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Shilston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from one or more of six places in Devon called Shilston(e), in Bishops Tawton, Chittlehampton, Drewsteignton, Exbourne, Modbury, and Throwleigh parishes.

variants.name: Shilstone
meanings: English:  see  Shilston  .

variants.name: Shilson
meanings: English:  see  Shilston  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr was born in 1366, in Devon, England, his father, Robert Hill, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. Robert Hill, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Isabella Wadham. He died on 25 April 1423, in Somerset, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr est né en 1366, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hill, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert Hill, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Isabella Wadham. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1423, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr 1366 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Hill 26 und seine Mutter Mrs. Robert Hill 23. Er hatte mit Isabella Wadham mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 25. April 1423 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Somerset, England und wurde in Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr è nato il nel 1366 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Robert Hill, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Robert Hill, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Isabella Wadham. Morì il 25 aprile 1423, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Srが1366年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Robert Hillは26歳，母Mrs. Robert Hillは23歳であった。彼はIsabella Wadhamとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1423年4月25日にイギリスソメルセトで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr(이)가 1366년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Hill(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Robert Hill(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Isabella Wadham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1423년 4월 25일 영국 서머세트에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr nasceu em 1366, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Hill, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Robert Hill, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Isabella Wadham. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1423, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr родился в 1366 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Hill было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert Hill, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Isabella Wadham. Он умер 25 апреля 1423 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
